description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage box with a robust, plank-style construction and a natural wood grain finish. The box features vertical and horizontal wooden slats, giving it a rustic and sturdy appearance suitable for outdoor or garage use. A metallic latch or clasp is visible on the top center, suggesting the presence of a lid that can be secured. The wood appears to be untreated or lightly finished, emphasizing its natural texture and color variations. There are no visible handles or labeling areas, and the box sits flat on its base. The overall design is utilitarian, making it ideal for storing tools, equipment, or miscellaneous items in urban environments.
description: A sturdy, rectangular wooden storage box with a natural plank finish and a metallic latch on top. Its rustic design is ideal for garages or outdoor urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vertical wooden slats and the central metallic latch on the lid.
description_view_1: Side view displaying horizontal wooden slats and the edge of the metallic latch, with no handles visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with vertical slats but no visible latch or hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with horizontal slats and the edge of the metallic latch, mirroring view 1.
